title: Autonomous loop operator plan improvement summary in recommended action v0
problem: Tickets 348–352 surface autonomous_loop_improvement_status in plan, autocycle, execute-safe, and README, but next_recommended_action.reason does not yet mention recommended_ticket_id or source_weakness when improvement artifacts exist (ticket-341 parity for scratch quality).
acceptance_criteria: When improvement status is ok, next_recommended_action.reason includes recommended_ticket_id and source_weakness or draft_count.
When improvement status is not_run, reason unchanged from scratch-only baseline.
No queue writes or ticket promotion.
